title: TFC: Creepy-crawlies
description: Adds worms to TFC for easy fishing bait
body:
Tired of using your valuable seeds as bait for fishing? Tired of fish just jumping away after using your precious metal to make a fishing rod? Look no further than TFC: Creepy-Crawlies!! This small mod adds new bait you can use for your rod and a trusty net to help you catch fish once you get them out of the water!
- New tools!
  - Worm Stick: Craft this tool using two sticks and a knife and go at it! Just point it at a bit of mud and hope for the best, (Your chances go up a little if you do it while its raining!)
![Worm Sitck crafting recipe ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fcd9c19bddbce12d8626a716f1fea41a950afb7a.png)
  - Net: A couple of sticks and cloth and you got yourself a net, use it either on fish out of the water or on bees!
![Net crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c19be078c0128a628aef34af6cbd21dac8a45a13.png)
![Using a net](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fa0f8f1bb9d27ea3baaa615710886de4efb0df42.png)
- New Bait
  - Worms, easy to get and quite tasty if you are fish 
  - Bees, an endangered animal and a bit spicy
